sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65696" key="meidiastiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μειδι-αστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n65696.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conducive to smiling</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μ., <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hilarity</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg011.perseus-grc1:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
